1:1.text: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. When have you felt Allah's mercy most recently?
Every action begins with bismillah. How intentional are you about beginning your daily tasks with remembrance?

1:2.text: All praise belongs to Allah, Lord of all the worlds. What are you most grateful for today?
Praising Allah is the first thing taught in the Quran. What would change if you started every morning with praise?

1:5.text: You alone we worship, and You alone we ask for help. In what area of life do you need to lean on Allah more?

1:6.text: Guide us to the straight path. What does staying on course look like for you right now?

112:1.text: Say: He is Allah, the One. How does this absolute oneness bring you peace in complicated times?

112:2.text: Allah is As-Samad — the Self-Sufficient. When do you catch yourself relying on things other than Allah?

113:1.text: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak. What darkness are you asking Allah to protect you from?

114:1.text: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind. What does it mean to you that the Creator of all people is also your personal protector?

114:5.text: The whisperer whispers into the hearts of people. What recurring thought patterns do you want to break free from?
